summary.shape_sentence: Bearish RTH session that opened near the upper zone, failed to reclaim prior value, rotated lower into the close, and finished near LOD.

goat.note: GOAT midday short near 29275-29285; bearish thesis persisted after failed reclaim.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots clustered near failed reclaim and upper-value rejection areas, especially around 29290-29300.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots produced only minor bounces and failed to create sustained upside continuation.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply near 29290-29300 was respected; price failed to reclaim and rotated lower.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Lower demand near 29220-29240 was tested into the close and only partially defended.

time_markers.10am_blue: Early upper test near 29285-29292; extension failed.
time_markers.2pm_green: Failed reclaim around 29290; rotation lower confirmed.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Bearish close near 29231, close near LOD.

takeaway: Bearish failed-reclaim day: early upper probing failed, the 12:00 GOAT short framed the session, and the afternoon confirmed downside rotation into a close near LOD.
